name: Caraway Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter or butter substitute until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks to the mixture and beat thoroughly.
3. Incorporate lemon juice, vanilla, and grated lemon rind.
4. Sift together flour, salt (if needed), baking powder, and caraway seeds.
5. Gradually add the sifted ingredients alternately with milk to the creamed mixture.
6. Mix in the caraway seed until well combined.
7. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
8. Fill muffin tins that have been well-oiled about 2/3 full with the batter.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for approximately 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
